name: Debug Discipline Engine
description: **Debug discipline: agent capability profiles + enforcement.** Limits each agent type to a tool subset; emits capability_violation events; opt-in block mode rejects calls outside the profile. **SUPERSEDED by COMP-MCP-ENFORCE-1 (2026-06-04 reconciliation):** re-filed as COMP-MCP-ENFORCE-1 ("Was COMP-DEBUG-1") and shipped COMPLETE 2026-06-02 — phase-scoped MCP tool capabilities (profile × phase CallTool gate); agent-capability profiles in `server/agent-templates.js` are the substrate.
